mapper.select: SELECT id, name, model, serial_number, manufacturer, manufacture_date, max_altitude, max_speed, weight, status, description, created_at, updated_at FROM uavs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO uavs (name, model, serial_number, manufacturer, manufacture_date, max_altitude, max_speed, weight, status, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{model}, #{serialNumber}, #{manufacturer}, #{manufactureDate}, #{maxAltitude}, #{maxSpeed}, #{weight}, #{status}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE uavs SET name = #{name}, model = #{model}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, manufacture_date = #{manufactureDate}, max_altitude = #{maxAltitude}, max_speed = #{maxSpeed}, weight = #{weight}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uavs WHERE 1=1
AND name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%'
AND model LIKE '%' || #{model} || '%'
AND serial_number LIKE '%' || #{serialNumber} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
